{{Infobox character
| name = Durandiel
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ghost|the Ghost]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, Eiras Luriana of Obelisk}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[judge|Judge]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Obelisk}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Durandiel, also known as [[the Ghost]], is a member of the [[Court of Seven]]. Formerly identified as Eiras Luriana of Obelisk, she distinguishes herself from her peers by wearing a dull gray dress composed of smoke rather than armor. She wields an instrument known as the Staff of [[the Ghost]], which she uses to manipulate reality and space. Her abilities include causing ripples in existence, interacting with the strings of time, and manifesting or fading from visibility. She has demonstrated immense power, such as catching massive [[diamond]] chains and possessing the ability to reverse injuries and planetary destruction. Durandiel has shown a capacity for both cold detachment and friendliness, and she has expressed interest in recruiting talented individuals to her organization.}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Durandiel]] is [[the Ghost]] and wears a dull gray dress.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Durandiel]] is known as [[the Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Durandiel]] suffered a wound in her side.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Durandiel]] was once known as Eiras Luriana of Obelisk.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Durandiel]] is also called [[the Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Durandiel]] wears a dress of gray smoke spun into fabric.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Durandiel]] is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
